title: Get to Know Your Customers ~ Basics of Marketing ~
description: Let's learn about getting to know our customers with Garu-chan in a fun way!

scenes.speech: Let's learn about marketing to understand our customers' hearts!
scenes.title: Get to Know Your Customers ~ Basics of Marketing ~

scenes.speech: Let's learn about getting to know our customers with Garu-chan!
scenes.title: What is Marketing?
scenes.content: Marketing = 'An activity to deliver what customers want, to those who want it, in the right way.' It's not just advertising! It includes market research → product development → pricing → advertising → sales → after-sales service!
scenes.highlight: A good product doesn't sell itself! Even the best product won't sell if it's not delivered well

scenes.speech: Let's learn about getting to know our customers with Garu-chan!
scenes.title: Create a Persona (Ideal Customer Image)
scenes.content: Who you're selling to is the most important! Persona: ① Age, sex ② Where they live ③ What they're struggling with ④ What kind of life they lead ⑤ What they value — By drawing a specific image of one person, your product and advertising will hit the mark!
scenes.highlight: Persona setting example: '35-year-old working mom struggling with short-time cooking' → Develop a product for this persona

scenes.speech: Let's learn about getting to know our customers with Garu-chan!
scenes.title: Understand the 4Ps (Marketing Mix)
scenes.content: ① Product (What to sell?) ② Price (How much to sell for?) ③ Place (Where to sell?) ④ Promotion (How to promote?) — Optimizing these 4Ps is a marketing strategy!
scenes.highlight: Example of 4Ps: iPhone = High-quality product, high price, Apple Store, and perfect combination of 4Ps

scenes.speech: Let's learn about getting to know our customers with Garu-chan!
scenes.title: Spread the Word for Free with SNS Marketing
scenes.content: Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, X (Twitter) — Using SNS, you can broadcast to the whole country and world for free! Even 10-year-olds can do it. The 'quality' and 'continuity' of content are important. Aim for 100 followers first!
scenes.highlight: TikTok fame → Product sells out overnight 'TikTok commerce': Young entrepreneurs are using it

scenes.speech: Let's learn about getting to know our customers with Garu-chan!
scenes.title: Word-of-Mouth is the Strongest Marketing
scenes.content: A friend's recommendation is more trustworthy than an ad. Intentionally creating word-of-mouth — Providing an experience, surprise, and excitement that makes users naturally share it!
scenes.highlight: Effect of word-of-mouth: 5 times more trustworthy than ads. Customers who came through introduction have a lifetime value 4 times higher

scenes.speech: Let's learn about getting to know our customers with Garu-chan!
scenes.title: How to Decide on a Price (Pricing Strategy)
scenes.content: ① Cost-based (cost + profit) ② Competitive comparison (match the market) ③ Value-based (set based on customer-perceived value) — 'Value-based' can set the highest price. Competing on 'cheapness' is the toughest strategy!
scenes.highlight: Premium pricing strategy: Starbucks sells 'experience, place, and brand', not just 'coffee'

scenes.speech: Let's learn about getting to know our customers with Garu-chan!
scenes.title: Community Marketing that Creates Fans
scenes.content: Collect 'likes' on SNS, hold events, and give special treatment to repeat customers — By making customers into fans, you can gather new customers without advertising costs. Having 1,000 true fans can make you profitable!
scenes.highlight: '1000 True Fans' theory: Having 1,000 die-hard fans, any creator can make a living

scenes.speech: Let's learn about getting to know our customers with Garu-chan!
scenes.title: Digital Marketing that Improves with Data
scenes.content: Google Analytics, Instagram Insights — Free tools show you 'who, when, what, and where users drop off' in numbers. Improving based on data can increase effectiveness by 10 times!
scenes.highlight: A/B testing: A method to test two types of ads and landing pages to see 'which one works better' in numbers

scenes.speech: Master marketing! Next, practice your pitch 🎉
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
